# AfriGlyph

> API for culturally specific payment success reactions in African fintech apps.

## Company

- Name: AfriGlyph Inc.
- Location: Delaware, USA
- Website: https://afriglyph.com
- Contact: founder@afriglyph.com
- Demo: https://cal.com/afriglyph/demo

## Product

AfriGlyph is a B2B API that returns five region-specific celebration Glyphs after each transaction. Partners send region and transaction type via one POST request; AfriGlyph returns curated reactions in GIF, PNG, and Lottie formats for in-app playback and WhatsApp sharing.

## Target Audience

B2B fintech and product teams building apps for African users who want to improve retention, dwell time, and cultural authenticity on payment success screens.

## Key Differentiators

- One POST integration — region and transaction type in, five Glyphs out
- Culturally specific reactions commissioned from African digital artists
- Fintech-compliant: no PII, only region and transaction context
- In-app WhatsApp sticker sharing without leaving the partner app
- 30-day pilot program ($1,000) with integration support

## Pages

- Home: https://afriglyph.com/
- Privacy: https://afriglyph.com/privacy
